title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Lucknow

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Lucknow
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Lucknow. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
